STORM SURVEY INDICATES A TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN AROUND 6 MILES WSW OF ADAIR AND PRODUCED AT LEAST EF1 DAMAGE. ADDITIONAL DETAILS...INCLUDING PATH LENGTH AND WIDTH...WILL BE PROVIDED ONCE THE SURVEY IS CONCLUDED.
